target: 3. Tokiko's Recollection ①
Tokiko Hishigata
(Ushio-san... really is gone, huh.)
(Even though I attended her funeral... I still can't believe it.)
(Why? Why did it come to this...)
(Shinpei-san is investigating the Shadows, that's what Father said.)
(My brother was saying something about having to talk to Father...)
(There are... unnatural marks left on Ushio-san's body.)
(All of this happening… )
Shadow…
(No, I shouldn't think about it…!)
(The day of the festival—everything will be over by the day after tomorrow. Things will go back to normal.)
(By the day after tomorrow… until then, I just have to…)
(I just want nothing else to happen…)
Huff…
Phone…?
Hello? Shouldn't the meal still be there?
…Yes.
…No, I'm alone at home right now.
B-By a Shadow!?

W-What are you talking about!?
That kind of thing never happened before!
Huh, Shinpei and the others…?

But…  
suddenly saying something like that…
I made a promise. I absolutely cannot lay a hand on her.

I know that already.  
If you die, Mother will…
Is there… isn't there any other way?
…I see.
Then… I'll hang up.
